title: Screenshot Uploader
body:
# This mod adds a better method of using screenshots, with options like opening the image and copying it to the clipboard.

### This is a Fabric mod, and requires Fabric API.



## **THIS IS A CLIENT-SIDE MOD, SO IT WILL NOT WORK ON SERVERS**

Credits:

[Screenshot To Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard): Most methods for copying an image to the clipboard

[Lunar Client](https://www.lunarclient.com): The model for the screenshot message, main reason this mod was made
